title: ophrys fuciflora subsp. andria
intro: Ophrys fuciflora subsp. andria, also known as the Andrian Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ophrys fuciflora subsp. andria include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil, and it can be used as a tea, tincture, or topical cream to harness its medicinal properties.
